items.title: Long Run
items.description: Run 10 km at a pace of 6:30 min/km. Aim to keep your heart rate in Zone 2 (130-145 bpm).

items.title: Speed Work
items.description: After a 10-minute warm-up, perform 5x800m intervals at a pace of 5:00 min/km with 2 minutes of recovery between each interval. Cool down for 10 minutes afterward.

items.title: Recovery Run
items.description: Run 5 km at an easy pace of 7:30 min/km. Keep your heart rate below 135 bpm to aid recovery.

items.title: Strength Training
items.description: Focus on full-body strength training with 3 sets of 10-12 reps for each exercise (squats, lunges, push-ups, and planks). Rest for 60 seconds between sets.
